calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-04-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-04-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Marina Franco, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Sutter House Apartments.
Karla Rossi, Resident Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendants Roberta Tucker, an individual or Ronald Roberts, an individual.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on July 16, 2008.

Plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---Lease Agreement dated 12/05/89-------------------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Three (3) Day Notice to Quit dated 06/23/08------------------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Sutter House Apartments, and against defendants Roberta Tucker, an individual and Ronald Roberts, an indivudal as follows:

Plaintiff Sutter House Apartments is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1140 Sutter Street, #410, San Francisco, CA. The lease is forfeited.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-30-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Wednesday, July 30, 2008: Marina R. Franco, counsel for plaintiff Sutter House Apartments

No appearance by defendant Roberta Tucker. Settlement conference off calendar. The August 4, 2008 trial date remains.

Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk L. Fong, not reported (218)
